---
title: "Data Dictionary"
author: "Tracy Huang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Data Dictionary:
| Variable | Type | What it represents|
| :--- | :---: | :---: |
| int_rate | numeric | interest rate on the loan |
| loan_amnt | numeric | amount of the loan issued |
| annual_inc | numeric | annual income of the borrower |
| emp_length | integer | employment length in years |
| dti | numeric | debt-to-income ratio |
| grade | factor | loan grade assigned by Lending Club (A-G| 
| purpose | categorical | stated purposed of the loan |
| home_ownership | categorical | Borrower's home ownership status |
| addr_state | categorical | state of the borrower |
| term | categorical | length of the loan (36 or 60 months) |
